feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: What is maximum line item can be present in accounting document in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have tried to find how many maximum line item we can have in accounting document but could find anything specifically for public cloud. There is 6 digit in line item like 000001 but note sure if 6 digit is the correct answer.

entry.title: SAP COLLECTIONS MANAGEMENT INITIAL DATA TRANSFER FROM AR to collection worklist.
entry.content:
SAP COLLECTIONS MANAGEMENT INITIAL DATA TRANSFER FROM AR to collection worklist.

We are in the process of extending collections management to some of our other jurisdictions. In cloud we have a confusion that how we can transfer existing customer line items (Initial data transfer) from AR to collections management so that the items are visible in collection worklists.

In SAP ECC we used to have a program (FDM_COLL_SEND_ITEMS ) to run and it transfers all data from AR to collections. Can we please have a confirmation on how to do the same in SAP public cloud . Do we schedule a job ? if yes than what is the job name ? as i have checked in collection management jobs and could not find any relevant job. Can this be confirmed asap as we will have our  Go live that is due soon on hold because of this. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Displaying Line Items with Tax Amount Included
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would like to know the available options for displaying line items with the tax amount included. Specifically, I want to see the tax amount wherever a tax code has been assigned.

Is this possible? If so, would the "Display Line Items in General Ledger" app be the correct tool for this purpose?

I have attached a screenshot for reference.

Thank you in advance for your insights!

entry.title: Is there something for user tolerance for accepting products below the minimum SLED on Synch GR?
entry.content:
Hello experts!
I´m working on the implementation of the Cloud Public Edition for a client that already has legacy SAP. The client has the following situation on the legacy system that he wants to keep for the new one:

On the Synchronous GR (Post Goods Movements/Migo), they have set a minimum remaining shelf life requirement. The system does not allow regular users (like warehouse operators) to post a GR if the product is below the minimum number of remaining shelf life days. Only a few users (like the warehouse supervisor) are allowed to post the GR of products below the minimum remaining shelf life.

Is there anything that could be done for this on the cloud public?

Best regards

entry.title: Create Supplier Invoice - Invoice Receipt Date
entry.content:
Hi All,

During Regression Testing we have noticed a new field "Invoice Receipt Date" in the Create Supplier Invoice application. I would like to understand impact of this field. Please can you advise.

Many thanks,

Monali

entry.title: Deployment of Organizational Structure from Development Tenant
entry.content:
Dear All

We have created an Organizational Structure having 7 company codes and around 300 organizational units in Development - Customizing (Implementation) system.

Now what is the use of creating such a huge organizational structure in development - development tenant once again manually while the organizational structure of customizing tenant has already been transported to QAS system.

Which Organizational Structure will be considered as final on QAS system, the one created in customizing tenant or development tenant.

entry.title: Configuration created in wrong Namespace
entry.content:
Dear All 

While implementing a Public Cloud Project , consultant from the background of On-Prem implementation created all configurations with Y Namespace. Usually configurations performed by customer, either during ABAP development or SPRO were starting from Z or Y or 9 namespace.

Later on, we found an SAP Note that 'Y' in public cloud is considered as SAP namespace.

Consultant has created following configuration with 'Y Namespace' and also moved it to QAS. Please confirm the impact and any possible solution or can we leave the configuration in 'Y namespace' as it is, as a lot of work has already completed in it.

  • Factory Calendar
  • Standard Value Key
  • Work Center Responsible
  • Routing planner group
  • MRP Controller
  • Special Procurement Types
  • Order Type
  • Production Scheduler & Profile

entry.title: Supplier Invoice Number Ranges
entry.content:
Dear All

We have seven company codes located in multiple countries. We want to have different Supplier Invoice Number Ranges within MM / Procurement Module, as each company code is a separate legal entity. 5 Company Codes are located in 1 country and remaining 2 in other countries.

Currently we are not able to find any option to change the interval or setup number ranges for Supplier Invoice within Procurement Module of Public Cloud.

Please suggest any alternate or  solution.

entry.title: Engineer to Order - On premise VS Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

what is the difference between 6GD scope item in public cloud and ETO in on premise. what are some major differences? 

For ex: Difference in Configuration, in Process flow, etc..,

Regards, 

Gunadharshini

entry.title: How to Create Custom field in Sales Quotation Item and Flow it to Subsequent Sales Order Item
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I got a requirement to Create a Custom field at Sales Quotation Item level and the Value Given at Quotation level should flow to subsequent Sales Order.

I tried creating Custom field through Custom Fields App in Key user extensibility and checked Business Context for Sales Quotation but didn't find. so tried creating field in Sales Document Item business context, the field is getting created in both Sales Quotation and Sales Order but the values which entered at Quotation level are not flowing to Sales order.

Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Need WBS ELEMENT in start condition of Manage workflow for journal entry verification
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Need to add wbs element in start condition in manage workflow for journal entry verification.

For that I have created badi but wbs element Value for help is not coming and i have given SCENARIO_ID = WS02800046.

I think due to service path & entity only the value is not coming.

please check and revert.

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF

CONSTANTS: co_id TYPE if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>ty_condition_id VALUE 'CF_SWF_FLEX_IFS_BADI_COND_SAMP'.

data : ls_condition like line of ct_condition.
data : ls_parameter like line of ct_parameter.

* WBS Element Condition
ls_condition-id = 'id_WBS'.
ls_condition-subject = 'WBS Element'.
ls_condition-type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_condtype-start_step.
append ls_condition to ct_condition.

* Parameter for Workflow level condition - WBS Element
ls_parameter-id = 'id_WBS'.
ls_parameter-name = 'WBS Element'.
ls_parameter-xsd_type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_xstype-string.
ls_parameter-service_path = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PROJECT_SRV'. " Update with appropriate OData service
ls_parameter-entity = 'WBSHierarchyNode'. " Adjust entity name accordingly
ls_parameter-property = 'WBSCode'. " Adjust property for WBS element
ls_parameter-mandatory = abap_false.
append ls_parameter to ct_parameter.

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL

CONSTANTS co_id TYPE if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>ty_condition_id VALUE 'CL_SWF_FLEX_IFS_BADI_COND_SAMP' ##NO_TEXT.

cv_is_true = abap_false.
DATA lt_wbs_element TYPE TABLE OF i_journalentryitem.

IF is_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_2 IS INITIAL.
SELECT WBSELEMENTINTERNALID INTO TABLE @LT_wbs_element
FROM i_journalentryitem
WHERE accountingdocument = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1.
ELSE.
SELECT WBSELEMENTINTERNALID INTO TABLE @LT_wbs_element
FROM i_journalentryitem
WHERE accountingdocument = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1
AND accountingdocumentitem = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_2.
ENDIF.

IF lt_wbs_element IS NOT INITIAL.
READ TABLE lt_wbs_element INTO DATA(ls_wbs_element) INDEX 1.
READ TABLE it_parameter_value INTO DATA(ls_param_wbs) WITH KEY name = 'WBS Element'.

IF sy-subrc EQ 0 AND ls_param_wbs-value = ls_wbs_element-WBSELEMENTINTERNALID.
cv_is_true = abap_true.
ENDIF.
ENDIF.

 

Kindly, requesting you to help on this.

Thanks,

entry.title: EDI MESSAGES FOR SUPPLIER CONNECTION
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

Could someone suggest me what all EDI Messages required for supplier connection .

entry.title: can we set up workflow when an order/ quote goes on credit block in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to trigger the workflow for quotation or sales order when document is in credit block. In workflow we can add condition to all document like if net value is more than some value then it will trigger workflow but that is not customer specific.

Please advise

entry.title: Procurement of Health Insurance premium for employees in S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a scenario involving the procurement of health insurance, where the purchase is based on a rate basis, with the rate varying according to the age bracket of the insured employee and their family members.

  • The health insurance agreement is structured on a Pro Rata basis, meaning the charges apply only for the covered period, rather than a fixed quantity or total value.
  • New Employee Addition: A new employee can be added to the existing health insurance agreement at any time during the year. The premium for the addition is calculated from the month of inclusion until the agreement's remaining validity period, rather than for a full year.
  • Employee Exit: If an employee leaves the organization during the agreement period, the premium charges will be deducted only for the months they were employed.
  • Premium rates vary based on the age brackets of the employee and their family members, necessitating a dynamic rate calculation mechanism.

Kindly provide us the most suitable approach to procure and map health insurance in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, considering the above factors. Kindly suggest an appropriate process and configuration to achieve this requirement effectively.

Thanks!

Regards,

Sabarinathan K

entry.title: Sector Change is possible for a project in Central Business Configuration?
entry.content:
1) What's the possibility if we want to change the sector of an already created evaluation project? Let's say we want to change the sector from public to private? And if we choose to proceed with this, are there going to be any conflict/consequences?

2) Can we delete a project, if not in use? Is there anything that need to be considered for this ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Best DMS on-premise backend for SAP HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone suggest a suitable on-premise CMIS compliant backend server for S4HC?

We tested the on-premise MS Sharepoint, but we were not able to connect the two systems.

Our management requirement is that it should be on-premise at leas the document storage backend.

Thank you in advanced!

entry.title: Extension field extension scenario in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Can anyone help me with the Extension field extension scenario in S4 Public Cloud .

which means I want to create extension fields on Material Master and extend it to purchase and sales orders.

I know about "Custom Field" app and tried the possibility there. In that I didn't find the business context to support my requirement.

Do someone have the similar requirement or solution from past ?

entry.title: Length issue for company name in CBC
entry.content:
We recently need to change the legal name of the companies. We detected the company name length is only 30 characters, Is there a way to extend this ?

entry.title: RE-FX Leasing valuation Rule Poland and Czech GAAP in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
I want to configure Valuation Rule for Poland and Czech GAAP in Lease Contract RE-FX in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud.

Please can anyone share steps for configuration?

Thank you.

Regards,

Shrinivas
